device_name: V5 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, H5 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, XV5 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, XH5 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, V4 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, H4 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, XV4 Diagnostic Ultrasound System, XH4 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and transducers are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-ope
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and transducers are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operative, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Thoracic, Peripheral vessel and Dermatology.
target_condition: Cardiac assessment in fetal and adult populations
ground_truth: Fetal: manual annotation by obstetrician (>20 years experience) and two sonographers (>10 years experience) in fetal cardiology, supervised by obstetrician (>25 years experience). Adult: manual tracing by two cardiologists (≥10 years experience) and two sonographers (≥10 years experience).
other_metrics: Fetal segmentation dice-score: 0.88; Adult segmentation dice-score: 0.93; Fetal size measurement error rates: area 8% or less, angle 4% or less, circumference 11% or less, diameter 11% or less; Adult B-mode/M-mode/Doppler-mode Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) 0.8 or more
